---
title: "the_three_item_loneliness_scale_tils"
subtitle: "`the_three_item_loneliness_scale_tils`"
description: "the_three_item_loneliness_scale_tils"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/the_three_item_loneliness_scale_tils/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                 | Title                        | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                          |
|----------------------|------------------------------|--------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`              | The unique name of the event | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                   |
| `center`             | Research center              | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                |
| `tils_feel_isolated` | tils_feel_isolated           | string | Frequency of participant feeling isolated from others. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).      |
| `tils_miss_company`  | tils_miss_company            | string | Frequency of participant missing having someone to be with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10). |
| `tils_feel_excluded` | tils_feel_excluded           | string | Frequency of participant feeling left out. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                  |

: Fields in the `the_three_item_loneliness_scale_tils` resource.
